Architecture

SGRN • Tied Embeddings • Vocab 88 • Pretrain (self-supervised LM) → Q&A finetune • Batched BPTT • AdamW • Cosine LR

Trained on 70,000 Q&A samples (10,000 × 7 categories) across 3 difficulty tiers, after self-supervised pretraining.

Download AGI 3JSON • 945 KB • 45,592 params

Math = Tool-Calling (the future of AI)

The calculator is ALWAYS right. The model only writes the equation.
word problem→ model forms equation→ calculator (always correct)→ answer

The model never computes. Its only job is typing the right equation for the tool. The single point of failure is the equation it forms — the arithmetic itself is delegated to a calculator that is correct by definition.

43.2%
Equation correct (model's job)
44.1%
Final answer (after calculator)

Example: Q "what is 4 less 6" → model emits "4-6" → calculator returns -2. When the equation is right, the answer is guaranteed right.

Quick Start

import json, numpy as np
d = json.load(open("ekalopha_agi3.json"))
W_E=np.array(d["W_E"]);W_f=np.array(d["W_f"]);U_f=np.array(d["U_f"])
b_f=np.array(d["b_f"]);W_h=np.array(d["W_h"]);U_h=np.array(d["U_h"])
b_h=np.array(d["b_h"]);b_y=np.array(d["b_y"]);dim=d["d"]
def fwd(inp):
    h=np.zeros(dim);out=[]
    for t in inp:
        e=W_E[t]
        f=1/(1+np.exp(-(W_f@e+U_f@h+b_f)))
        c=np.tanh(W_h@e+U_h@h+b_h)
        h=f*h+(1-f)*c; out.append(h@W_E.T+b_y)
    return out
c2i={c:i for i,c in enumerate(d["chars"])}
i2c={i:c for i,c in enumerate(d["chars"])}
def gen(p,ml=32):
    idx=[c2i[c] for c in f"Q: {p}\nA:" if c in c2i]
    for _ in range(ml):
        ni=int(np.argmax(fwd(idx)[-1]))
        if i2c.get(ni)=='\n':break
        idx.append(ni)
    return ''.join(i2c[i] for i in idx).split("A:")[-1]
# math = tool calling: model writes equation, calculator solves it
eq = gen("what is 12 plus 7")
print(eq, "=", eval(eq))   # the calculator is always right
